hero.subtitle: Holistic Healing
hero.title: Holistic Healing in the Heart of Oslo.
hero.description: A serene escape from the city. Grounded in nature, guided by touch. Reconnect with your body's natural rhythm.

intro.subtitle: Philosophy
intro.title: Rooted in the landscape, focused on the individual.
intro.description: At ConstantCare, we believe that true restoration requires more than just physical manipulation. It requires a deliberate step away from the noise, entering a space designed to quiet the mind and ground the spirit.
intro.text1: At ConstantCare, we believe that true restoration requires more than just physical manipulation. It requires a deliberate step away from the noise, entering a space designed to quiet the mind and ground the spirit.
intro.text2: Our approach integrates traditional Scandinavian therapeutic techniques with a holistic understanding of the nervous system. Every session is curated to your current state of being, utilizing organic oils crafted from local flora.

m30.title: 30 min Massage
m30.description_short: Quick, targeted relief for busy schedules. Focus on specific tension areas.
m30.description_long: Give the gift of quick, targeted relief. This 30-minute massage is perfect for those with busy schedules who need to melt away stress or focus on a specific problem area, like a stiff neck, tight shoulders, or lower back tension. It is the ideal “pick-me-up” to reset the body and mind during a hectic week.

m40.title: 40 min Massage
m40.description_short: The perfect middle ground. Balanced therapy for deep relaxation.
m40.description_long: The perfect middle ground. A 40-minute massage provides enough time to fully unwind while allowing the therapist to work deeply on stubborn muscle knots. It offers a balanced combination of targeted therapy for the back, neck, and shoulders, along with soothing relaxation techniques to leave the recipient feeling completely refreshed.

m50.title: 50 min Massage
m50.description_short: The ultimate full-body escape. Intensive focus on chronic tension.
m50.description_long: The ultimate escape. This comprehensive 50-minute massage allows for a full-body relaxation experience or a deep, intensive focus on multiple areas of chronic tension. It is the perfect gift for someone who truly deserves to be pampered, offering ample time to disconnect from the world, relieve deep-seated muscle fatigue, and restore total well-being.

eco.title: Organic Oils
eco.text: Cold-pressed, locally sourced botanical oils tailored to your skin's needs.

waves.title: Nervous System Reset
waves.text: Techniques specifically designed to shift you from fight-or-flight to rest-and-digest.

nature.title: Grounded Approach
nature.text: Treatments that focus on the connection between physical tension and mental stress.

chair.title: Quiet Environment
chair.text: An acoustically treated space ensuring complete silence and sensory peace.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Details about our services and policies.
faq.not_found_title: Can't find what you're looking for?

items.q: What oils do you use for treatments?
items.a: We use exclusively cold-pressed, locally sourced organic botanical oils tailored to your skin's needs and current physical state.

items.q: Do I need to prepare before my session?
items.a: No special preparation is needed. We recommend arriving 10 minutes early to settle in, enjoy a warm herbal tea, and disconnect from the city noise.

items.q: How do I book a session?
items.a: You can book directly via our contact form or by reaching out to hey{'@'}constantcare.no. We will confirm your appointment within a few hours.

items.q: Can you accommodate specific physical conditions or injuries?
items.a: Yes. Before every session, our therapists conduct a brief consultation to understand your physical condition and customize the treatment accordingly.
We are located in the quiet neighborhood of Majorstuen in Oslo, easily accessible yet secluded enough to offer complete sensory peace.

contact.title: Visit the Clinic
contact.description: Located in the quiet neighborhood of Majorstuen, our studio is a short walk from major transit lines but feels miles away from the urban rush. We offer high-end, holistic massage therapy in Oslo, specializing in deep tissue, relaxation, and nervous system regulation.

testimonials.quote: Entering ConstantCare feels like leaving the city entirely. The attention to detail, from the scent of the oils to the deliberate pace of the massage, is unmatched in Oslo. Truly a restorative experience.
testimonials.author: E. Johansen
